response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior full-stack generalist with genuine high-throughput systems exposure and a clear mentoring streak, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His professional C++ experience is roughly one year (National Instruments plus thesis work), far short of the required 8 years, and his large-scale infrastructure experience (~2 years of low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, mostly in DLang) falls well below the 5-year bar. His recent work is TypeScript/Node product engineering, and he has held no formal technical-leadership role over cloud or platform teams, making him a poor match for a C++-centric cloud compute platform tech lead position.
strengths: Hands-on low-latency, high-scale backend experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Proven mentor and knowledge-sharer through workshops, courses, and long-running open-source maintainership
Broad polyglot engineering range across web, backend, embedded, and DevOps tooling
concerns: Roughly 1 year of professional C++ versus the required 8 years
Large-scale infrastructure and distributed-systems depth (~2 years) falls short of the 5-year minimum
No formal technical-leadership role leading or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
